pages.raw_text:
The Structural alliance last
night received communication
from the Carpenters union stating
that this union had withdrawn
from the alliance. The communica-
ton was referred TO the lnterna-
tional Structural Building Trades
alliance.


The owners Of the Star Shingle
mill and the ice rink and plant
sent in a letter stating that they
would hire only union men in the
future if the boycott was taken off
their business. A committee will
wait on the company. Union men
don't take the statements of the
officers seriously, as an agreement
was signed up with them last
spring which they claim was never
lived up to.


The International Hold Carriers
union sent a communication to the
alliance stating that the hod car
riers claimed jurisdiction over ce.
ment work on buildings.
